task_completion.description: Verify the 'regional_atlas' workspace is created with the correct URI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Workspaces' page showing a workspace named 'regional_atlas' with the Namespace URI 'http://atlas.regional.example.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'world_geodata' PostGIS datastore is created in the 'regional_atlas' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Stores' page showing a store named 'world_geodata' of type PostGIS, associated with the 'regional_atlas' workspace.
GeoServer 'Styles' page showing 'continent_colors' in the list of styles, or the Style Editor page with 'continent_colors' as the name.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'continent_colors' style contains exactly 7 classification rules using ogc:PropertyIsEqualTo on the 'continent' attribute with unique colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer Style Editor for 'continent_colors', the SLD XML code must show 7 distinct `<Rule>` blocks. Each rule must contain an `<ogc:PropertyIsEqualTo>` filter with `<ogc:PropertyName>continent</ogc:PropertyName>` and an `<ogc:Literal>` for a specific continent (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America). Each rule must also have a `<PolygonSymbolizer>` with a unique fill color.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'ne_countries' table is published as a layer named 'countries'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Layers' page showing a layer named 'countries', or the 'Edit Layer' page for 'countries' showing it is published from the 'ne_countries' resource in the 'world_geodata' store.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'countries' layer is configured with 'continent_colors' as its default style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Edit Layer' page for the 'countries' layer, under the 'Publishing' tab, the 'Default Style' dropdown must have 'continent_colors' selected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GeoServer web GUI to configure the service.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the GeoServer web administration interface (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/) in a browser, rather than using a terminal to send curl/REST API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually generated or inputted the SLD XML code.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Style Editor text area should show the actual XML code being edited or pasted, not just an empty box or a script bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GeoServer application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar should show localhost:8080 and standard GeoServer UI elements (menus, headers) should be visible and properly rendered.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected namespace URI is exactly 'http://atlas.regional.example.org'. The source table is 'ne_countries'. The style must contain exactly 7 rules for the 7 continents (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America). The property name in the OGC filter must be lowercase 'continent' (e.g., <ogc:PropertyName>continent</ogc:PropertyName>).
